novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1 | Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=letter below novelty_target=field; current kernel is mainly an affine image of a rank-one bridge nullspace plus a generic endpoint-face tightening criterion, so it needs a stronger non-routine result to clear the field floor.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1 | Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: GhassamiShpitserTchetgen2023 is presented in the handoff/§13 as JASA 119(545):552--564, but verification supports arXiv:2304.04374 as the stable source; supply a verified journal citation or cite it as a preprint.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Upgrade Conjecture 1 from coordinate intervals to the sharp joint PNDE/TNIE set, including the coupled multi-cell null-parameter geometry and when coordinate-wise bounds are jointly attainable.
Replace Conjecture 2's generic face-emptiness statement with observable rank/probability inequalities that certify strict proxy tightening and quantify width reduction over no-proxy bounds.
Add an explicit non-subsumption example against Ghassami-Shpitser-Tchetgen and Zhang-Li-Miao-Tchetgen showing a natural-mediation quantity their results do not already bound in this closed form.
Correct the Ghassami citation metadata and update Han-Luo-Zhang-Gu to the verified JMVA volume/year if retained.

recommended_next_step: Revise the novelty kernel toward a joint sharp-set or observable strict-tightening theorem, then rerun novelty review before Stage 0.
